name: Ollie Fearing's Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a bowl combine beef, pork, onion, carrot, celery, green pepper, garlic, parsley and half of the bread crumbs. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Fold in egg, tomatoes, Tabasco and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Shape meat mixture into a loaf shape in a large cast-iron skillet. Top with bacon strips and remaining bread crumbs.
5. Bake for 1 1/2 hours, until cooked through.
